channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: As Human-Wildlife Conflict Rises, Zimbabwean Communities Find New Ways to Coexist
item.description: As Human-Wildlife Conflict Rises, Zimbabwean Communities Find New Ways to Coexist — via TriplePundit #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: TriplePundit

item.title: UN Women Seeks Civil Society Input for New Five-Year Gender Equality Strategy @263Chat
item.description: By Shalom Shawurwa UN Women Zimbabwe has begun consultations on a new five-year strategic plan inviting civil society organisations to help shape policies and programmes aimed at advancing gender equality and empowering women and girls across the country. The strategy, which will guide the organisation’s [...] The post UN Women Seeks Civil Society Input for New Five-Year Gender Equality Strategy appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Fastjet and Etihad Partnership Could Open New Opportunities for Zimbabwean Travellers
item.description: In an exciting piece of news for the Zimbabwean travel industry, it was recently announced that Etihad Airways has signed... Continue reading "Fastjet and Etihad Partnership Could Open New Opportunities for Zimbabwean Travellers" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Kazembe hails Mnangagwa as a ’true constitutionalist’ @bulawayo24
item.description: HOME Affairs and Cultural Heritage Minister Kazembe Kazembe has described President Emmerson Mnangagwa as a committed constitutionalist, saying the recent constitutional reforms demonstrate his admini... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Sibanda challenges Constitution Amendment No. 3 in ConCourt @bulawayo24
item.description: Former Binga North legislator and lawyer Prince Dubeko Sibanda has filed an application in the Constitutional Court seeking to have key provisions of the Constitution of Zimbabwe Amendment (No. 3) Act... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: South Africa traditional leaders denounce xenophobic attacks @bulawayo24
item.description: A delegation of South African traditional leaders has used a visit to Zimbabwe to condemn xenophobia, saying migration-related challenges should be resolved through dialogue rather than violence.The d... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Why Zimbabwe hosting CIMAM 2026 is a bigger deal than it looks @3menonaboat
item.description:
We present 5 reasons why CIMAM 2026 in Harare is not just "nice cultural news"

The post Why Zimbabwe hosting CIMAM 2026 is a bigger deal than it looks first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

(via Three Men On Boat) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: Knox Mtizwa’s Triangle FC move falls through as FC Hunters enter race
item.description: Knox Mtizwa’s Triangle FC transfer has collapsed, with FC Hunters now chasing the experienced striker as his next move unfolds. The post Knox Mtizwa’s Triangle FC move falls through as FC Hunters enter race appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Zulu, AmaMpondo kings meet Mnangagwa, reject South African xenophobia
item.description: ‘A person who lawfully enters another country and complies with its laws should always be treated with dignity’ The post Zulu, AmaMpondo kings meet Mnangagwa, reject South African xenophobia appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. (via Zimbabwean News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Reserve Bank Of Zimbabwe Targets Banks Over Abusive Loan Practices And Debt Traps @ReserveBankZIM
item.description: Banks On Notice As RBZ Targets The Lending Practices Affecting Thousands Of Zimbabweans The Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe (RBZ) has targeted banks and microfinance institutions over abusive loan practices and debt traps, warning that lenders which push already struggling borrowers deeper into debt or use unfair debt recovery methods could face regulatory action. The warning [...] The post Reserve Bank Of Zimbabwe Targets Banks Over Abusive Loan Practices And Debt Traps appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Tuckshop owners are exploiting free repatriation buses from Musina
item.description: A new ZACC and Local Government task force will investigate corruption allegations in councils, aiming to strengthen transparency and public trust. The post Tuckshop owners are exploiting free repatriation buses from Musina appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Dr Trishula Patel launches “Becoming Zimbabwean: A History of Indians in Rhodesia” @3menonaboat
item.description:
The book was born of something more common than not in the land between two rivers than many would like to admit.

The post Dr Trishula Patel launches “Becoming Zimbabwean: A History of Indians in Rhodesia” first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

(via Three Men On Boat) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: Prison Officer In Court Over Allegedly Helping Convicted Rapist And Killer Escape
item.description: Court Hears How Convicted Rapist Allegedly Escaped With Help From Prison Officer A Zimbabwe Prisons and Correctional Service (ZPCS) officer has appeared in court after being accused of helping convicted rapist Cabangani Mike Mathe escape from Plumtree Prison by allegedly providing him with hacksaw blades. The officer, Yusufu Yusufu, is facing a charge of facilitating [...] The post Prison Officer In Court Over Allegedly Helping Convicted Rapist And Killer Escape appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Global sensation Learnmore Jonasi joins Trevor Noah’s SA National Team of Comedy @3menonaboat @learnmorejonasi
item.description:
Organisers confirm signing Zimbabwe’s breakout star

The post Global sensation Learnmore Jonasi joins Trevor Noah’s SA National Team of Comedy first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

(via Three Men On Boat) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: ZACC Chairperson Mr Michael Reza’s Wife Dies: Is There More to This Tragic Loss?
item.description: The nation of Zimbabwe has been cast into a sombre mood following the sudden passing of Mrs Chipo Reza, the esteemed wife of Mr Michael Reza, chairperson of the Zimbabwe Anti-Corruption Commission (ZACC). Mrs Reza, aged 63, reportedly collapsed at her residence on a Sunday afternoon, a tragic event that has naturally prompted an investigative [...] The post ZACC Chairperson Mr Michael Reza’s Wife Dies: Is There More to This Tragic Loss? first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zulu king calls for orderly migration in Africa during Zimbabwe visit
item.description: Zulu king calls for orderly migration in Africa during Zimbabwe visit — via Daily Dispatch #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Daily Dispatch

item.title: Shared history no excuse to break SA immigration laws – Zulu king tells Mnangagwa
item.description: Inside Politic King Misuzulu kaZwelithini has told Zimbabwean President Emmerson Mnangagwa that the historic ties linking communities across southern Africa should not be used as a licence to disregard South Africa’s immigration laws. The AmaZulu King said compliance with immigration laws was standard international practice intended to ensure the orderly and lawful movement of people [...] The post Shared history no excuse to break SA immigration laws – Zulu king tells Mnangagwa appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News
